title: 2024.11.27Data access patterns for simple Stripe integrationsSummary:Is your Stripe integration ready to scale with your application? In this blog post, explore smart data strategies to enhance performance and security. Learn how to leverage Stripe/'s features, secure web backends, and serverless functions for efficient data management. Discover when to integrate a global CDN and use a separate database for deeper data control, ensuring a seamless user experience.Author:Ben SmithTopics:Event Des
author: Ben Smith
